stations.name: Closest stations are Ascot and Doomben
stations.walk_minutes_note: No station within Hamilton itself for many addresses.

ferry.terminal: Bretts Wharf and Apollo Road CityCat terminals
ferry.note: CityCat to the CBD and South Bank.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Hamilton via Kingsford Smith Drive and Racecourse Road.

driving.motorway_access: Direct Gateway Motorway and airport access.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 10 to 14 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.
driving.airport_access_note: Brisbane Airport approximately 8 to 10 minutes off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Portside Wharf is the suburb's premium dining and retail precinct on the river. Racecourse Road in Ascot is within walking distance for additional cafes and dining.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage along Kingsford Smith Drive and Hamilton Reach.

pockets.name: Hamilton Hill
pockets.character: Elevated streets with grand homes and city or river outlooks. Premium pocket.

pockets.name: Hamilton Reach / Northshore
pockets.character: Riverside apartment market in the Northshore Hamilton precinct.

pockets.name: Kingsford Smith Drive corridor
pockets.character: Streets close to the arterial. Mix of stock types.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers moving up to the established premium inner-north.
Apartment market at Hamilton Reach attracts professionals and downsizers.
Sydney and Melbourne relocators drawn by airport proximity and the heritage character.
